name: big-break
description: Big Break — a genre-agnostic swipe-roguelike engine with swappable content packs, powering a music-career game.

scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck && node tools/lint-content.mjs && node tools/simulate.mjs --check && node test/ui-smoke.mjs && node test/ui-crowding.mjs && node test/ui-mobile-matrix.mjs
